resources.string: Lungthawhnak %1$.1f°%2$s cu na ri %3$.1f°%2$s tiang a tla
Na server chungin data.txt download tuah i zuam
Ralrin peknak: A cunglei thimnak tuah khawhnak nih na battery kha a hlan nakin rang deuh in a zorter khawh
Custom URL cu set a si lo, asiloah a thiang lo. Custom URL chap awkah settings ah na lut kho
Data URL cu a thiang lo
Data le kharnak vialte kha hloh dih
Hmannak update tuah aa zuam lio ah palhnak a um
Hmuhchungnak data kha tuaktan khawh lo
Na settings ah URL kha khumh.txt
Forecast type \'%1$s\' cu a hman lo, na settings file kha zoh law i zuam ṭhan
URL kha chiah lo ding, settings.txt kha thlen ding kha hmailei ah chiah
Ka Fix lai i, i zuam ṭhan
Hi app hi update a si cang nain na pehtlaihmi server nih hin weeWX caah Inigo Plugin cu a update lo. Fields cu weeWX update an tuah hlan tiang ttha tein an lang kho lo
Update karlak cu a dik lo, settings kha update tuah hnu ah tuah ṭhan a si
A luan ciami thla hna ah Statistics
A luan ciami kum 2019 nak in a si
Kut in update set, a thar in thlen khawhnak ding caah a thar in thlen khawh a si
Lungthawhnak %1$.1f°%2$s cu na ri %3$.1f°%2$s tiang a kai cang
A hnu thlapa thil cangmi hna?
Download le app a um lo
Khuacaan, ruahsurnak asiloah ruahsurnak nih na khiahmi ri a tlinh tikah ralrinnak pek awkah theihternak a herh
Theihternak nawl voihnih na al caah, cu nakin settings ah na on a hau, settings thawk?
Na pekmi URL kan verify lio ah rak hngak rih
Radar hmanthlak download tuah khawh a si lo
Radar hmanthlak cu download a si rih
Radar phun \'%1$s\' cu a hman lo, na settings file kha zoh law i zuam than
Radar URL cu set lo. Thlennak caah settings ah na kal khawh
Ruah nih na khiahmi ri a phak tikah nifatin ralrin peknak
Ruahsurnak %1$.2f%2$s cu na ri %3$.2f%2$s he aa tlak
Ruahsurnak %1$.1f%2$s cu na ri %3$.1f%2$s he aa tlak
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.2fin ruah a surmi nih \'A fak\'mi dirhmun a phan
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.2fin ruahsurnak nih \'Ralrinnak\' level a phan cang
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.2fin ruahsurnak nih \'Zoh\' level a phan cang
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.1fmm ruahsurnak nih \'A fak\' timi dirhmun a phan cang
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.1fmm ruahsurnak nih \'Ralrinnak\' level a phan cang
A luan ciami %2$d %3$s ah %1$.1fmm ruahsurnak nih \'Zoh\' level a phan cang
Ruah a sur tuk lai timi ralrin peknak?
Ruah sur caan sauhnak cung ah hram bunh in ruah sur ning nih a fak tukmi ri a lonh ahcun ralrin peknak
Ruah fak tuk in a sur lai tiah ralrin peknak
Ruah sur caan sauhnak cung ah hram bunh in ralrin peknak ri a lonh ahcun ralrin peknak
Ruahsur caan sauhnak cung ah hram bunh in ruahsurnak nih zoh rikhiahmi a lonh ahcun ralrin peknak
Data vialte hloh dih na duh ti kha na zumh maw?
Nikhat ah voihnih tiang lum le kih nih na chiahmi ri a phak tikah ralrinnak a pek
Manual updates ah chiah, asinain a chunglei thilri a um rih lo
URL cu default ah an chiah asiloah a lawngmi a si
Custom URL in a langhtermi custom URL in pehtlaihnak le download tuah khawh a si lo maw
Na server chungin data.txt pehtlaihnak le download tuah khawh a si lo maw
Forecast pehtlaihnak le download tuah khawh a si lo
Forecast pehtlaihnak le download tuah khawh a si lo
Internet in radar= hmanthlak pawl kha pehtlaihnak le download tuahnak in download khawh a si lo caah
Na server chungin settings pawl kha pehtlaihnak le download tuah khawh a si lo maw
Na server chungin webcam hmanthlak pakhat kha a pehtlaih khawh lo asiloah download khawh a si lo maw
Webcam hmanthlak cu download a si rih
Webcam URL cu set a si lo asiloah a thiang lo
Update tuah a si ko nain WiFi pehtlaihnak a um lo
